name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Next == /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ head = tail
        /\ q[head] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1) \\
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active \\
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, FiniteSet
VARIABLES chunkSize, chunks, file, lostChunks, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq(Byte)
    /\ chunkSize \in Nat
    /\ chunks \in Seq(Seq(Byte))
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ sentChunks \in FiniteSet[Seq(Byte)]
    /\ receivedChunks \in FiniteSet[Seq(Byte)]
    /\ lostChunks \in FiniteSet[Seq(Byte)]
    /\ Len(chunks) = Len(file) \div chunkSize
    /\ Len(chunks) \in Nat
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ Len(sentChunks) \in Nat
    /\ Len(receivedChunks) \in Nat
    /\ Len(lostChunks) \in Nat

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunkSize = 1
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ receivedChunks = {}
    /\ lostChunks = {}

Next ==
    /\ file \in Seq(Byte)
       /\ chunkSize \in Nat
       /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) \div chunkSize |-> SubSeq(file, (i-1)*chunkSize+1, i*chunkSize)]
       /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
       /\ sentChunks \in FiniteSet[Seq(Byte)]
       /\ receivedChunks \in FiniteSet[Seq(Byte)]
       /\ lostChunks \in FiniteSet[Seq(Byte)]
       /\ Len(chunks) = Len(file) \div chunkSize
       /\ Len(chunks) \in Nat
       /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
       /\ Len(sentChunks) \in Nat
       /\ Len(receivedChunks) \in Nat
       /\ Len(lostChunks) \in Nat
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {chunk}
       /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks \cup {chunk}
       /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks \cup {chunk}
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
       /\ chunk \in chunks
       /\ chunk \notin sentChunks
       /\ chunk \notin receivedChunks
       /\ chunk \notin lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    \/ /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
       /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ chunk \in chunks
       /\ chunk \notin sentChunks
       /\ chunk \notin receivedChunks
       /\ chunk \notin lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount >= MAX_RETRIES
    \/ /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
       /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ chunk \in chunks
       /\ chunk \in sentChunks
       /\ chunk \notin receivedChunks
       /\ chunk \notin lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    \/ /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
       /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ chunk \in chunks
       /\ chunk \in sentChunks
       /\ chunk \in receivedChunks
       /\ chunk \notin lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    \/ /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
       /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ chunk \in chunks
       /\ chunk \in sentChunks
       /\ chunk \in receivedChunks
       /\ chunk \in lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    \/ /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
       /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ chunk \in chunks
       /\ chunk \in sentChunks
       /\ chunk \in receivedChunks
       /\ chunk \in lostChunks
       /\ retransmitCount >= MAX_RETRIES

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunkSize, chunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks, lostChunks>>
